textByHash.ed8619cd0040dbfcce46fbe71452262dd78c9941: Is there any chance you could help me?
textByHash.01fe7b97c2a10ee6ca95a0ce5c2a5fb1306a7f4b: It's my husband, he works on a fishing platform. Once a month he takes our son, Kennith, out with him.
textByHash.72880ec7eec93bf3ddb244bf9afa1d85d45c2334: They usually write to me regularly, but I've heard nothing all week. It's very strange.
textByHash.c288345a11fea1ea22abffc88b2e221383db525a: Maybe, but no-one's heard from the other fishermen on the platform. Their families are becoming quite concerned.
textByHash.485fb7c46f367dc743f6da36d181c533a736e3e6: Is there any chance you could visit the platform and find out what's going on?
textByHash.d4e8966e5b74a3874c63ea29348dd88067ed2fc9: That's very good of you . My friend Holgart will take you there.
textByHash.49a7288124dea5f1e5ebe5771796f81ce210efe3: I'll reward you for your time. It'll give me peace of mind to know Kennith and my husband, Kent, are safe.
textByHash.89df7a34a545cfa3088e8b6fbb1df15c69b128df: Brave , have you any news about my son and his father?
textByHash.98629b9378d09098658552562bdbc9eead14eb27: Please bring them back safe and sound.
textByHash.160089167cbb8069b596957bcb024756542c001c: Kennith told me about the strange goings-on at the platform. I had no idea it was so serious.
textByHash.8a31fa18bd4c2746e446bf50aa0ec5cc70cfb33c: I could have lost my son and my husband if it wasn't for you.
textByHash.e6d17485321535b878e297fa0baad053268ff366: Yes, Holgart told me and sent a rescue party out. Kent's back home now, resting with Kennith. I don't think he'll be doing any fishing for a while.
textByHash.9c4056f1cc1b09e3def6dd83088072e96a27056c: Here, take these Oyster pearls as a reward. They're worth quite a bit and can be used to make lethal crossbow bolts.
textByHash.d191870ded00a559f1f23cfd92db5228098d0885: Thank you. Take care of yourself .
textByHash.f9d7ac7f947a4910e10e0784783d5d957552bb0f: That's very good of you . My friend Holgart will take you there.
textByHash.0aaca41965522e011650f50bfe93459fea781121: I'm good. Busy as always looking after Kent and Kennith but no complaints.
